title: The Next Threat Emerges
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the next threat emerges.
scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa, there's really something wrong with her...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Out of the way, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The kids have stopped in their tracks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hold back on the violence, you bastards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Of course!! That's out of bounds !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Garry this girl there, for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: I didn't give them... any candy ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Shit!! This is all my fault!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Because I'm definitely going to save you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You'll grow up, no doubt about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You're "Straw Hat" aren't you, you bastard !!!

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
